title: Command palette redesign (drop /slash, route to Bash, recents + tab/quick actions)

planning_decisions.decision: Execute all 5 stories (S031-1 through S031-5) in sequence without parallelism
planning_decisions.rationale: S031-2 introduces resolveBashTarget helper which is needed by S031-3. S031-4 builtin commands include theme/font toggles that S031-5 also uses. Sequential execution avoids merge conflicts in command-palette.tsx.
planning_decisions.reference: DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.json priority_rules[2]: Phase 区切り > 半完成投入

planning_decisions.decision: Reuse existing /api/repos/{repoId}/branches/{branchId}/files/search endpoint for ? grep mode rather than creating a new endpoint
planning_decisions.rationale: The existing endpoint already does filesystem grep. Adding ?content=1 flag to differentiate content search from path search is the minimal change. DESIGN_PRINCIPLES: 既存資産活用 > 新規実装.
planning_decisions.reference: DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.json priority_rules[5]: 既存資産活用 > 新規実装

planning_decisions.decision: resolveBashTarget helper lives in frontend/src/lib/bash-target.ts (new file) rather than inline in command-palette.tsx
planning_decisions.rationale: S031-3 (Run button) and S032 (user commands) both need the same resolution logic. A shared lib avoids duplication. DESIGN_PRINCIPLES: 既存資産活用 > 新規実装.

planning_decisions.decision: locale-aware font/theme settings read from/write to localStorage via deviceSettings helper that already exists in the codebase
planning_decisions.rationale: CLAUDE.md: デバイス固有（ブラウザ）: localStorage（プレフィクス palmux:）. No new storage abstraction needed.
planning_decisions.reference: CLAUDE.md 設定管理セクション

implementation_decisions.decision: listRecents() called inside items useMemo (not useState) so pushRecent() during the same palette session reflects immediately
implementation_decisions.rationale: useState(() => listRecents()) creates a stale snapshot; the memo re-reads on every render cycle. Self-review fix 1.

implementation_decisions.decision: After resolveBashTarget auto-creates a Bash tab, navigate using termKey.tabId directly — not the stale tabs[] snapshot
implementation_decisions.rationale: After addTab(), the Zustand store's activeBranch.tabSet.tabs is stale in the current closure. The new tab's id is in termKey.tabId. Self-review fix 2.

implementation_decisions.decision: grep:searching sentinel rendered as non-interactive <li> with .empty class, excluded from keyboard selectableCount
implementation_decisions.rationale: A <button> with a noop perform is keyboard-accessible but useless — misleads screen-reader and keyboard users. Self-review fix 4.

implementation_decisions.decision: data-testid on palette items uses item.id.replace(/[:/]/g, '-') to produce valid CSS selector strings for Playwright
implementation_decisions.rationale: Grep result IDs contain ':' and '/' from file paths. CSS attribute selectors break on these characters. Self-review fix 5.

implementation_decisions.decision: normaliseRemoteURL handles ssh:// prefix in addition to git@ SCP format
implementation_decisions.rationale: palmux2's own remote is configured as ssh://git@github.com/... which the original implementation did not handle. Discovered during E2E.

implementation_decisions.decision: updateMruBashTab is exported from bash-target.ts but not yet wired to terminal-manager.ts
implementation_decisions.rationale: MRU tracking requires terminal-manager to emit pty input events per tab. This is a S032 integration point — wiring it now would touch terminal-manager and risk regression. Noted in review.
implementation_decisions.reference: DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.json priority_rules[2]: Phase 区切り > 半完成投入

review_decisions.decision: builtinCommands useMemo depends on deviceSettings — acceptable for now, note for S032 optimization
review_decisions.rationale: Each font/theme toggle re-computes builtinCommands. Not a correctness issue; minor perf concern deferred to S032.

review_decisions.decision: window.prompt() used for rename-current tab — acceptable for v0.3, polish deferred
review_decisions.rationale: A native prompt is consistent with the existing rename flow in TabBar context menu. An inline text field would be better UX but is out of scope for S031.

review_decisions.decision: S032 should wire updateMruBashTab to terminal-manager.ts and cap > mode command list
review_decisions.rationale: Review identified two deferred items: mru tracking not wired, and > mode list uncapped (only 'all' mode is capped via capByKind). Both are S032 integration tasks.
